text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I had thought the road to glory blocked and
impassable...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
But that is when I saw my prayers answered one
by one, clearing the blockage away!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to my fans who never gave up on me,
we've come to the last big event of the spring
season—the Takarazuka Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
And I won't let it all be for naught, Trainer! I'll run
the best race of my life!
choice_data_list: How are you feeling? You ready?
How are you feeling? You ready?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I am. I used to compete by scraping by on my
good luck. I chose to only follow my predictions...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
But now I've got the hopes of all my fans to count
on! I feel stronger than ever!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: My wish to win, and my fans' wish to see me win...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Add a little dollop of luck on top of that, and
there isn't a single thing to be scared of.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Fate will not win this race for me—victory will be
claimed by me, and me alone!
choice_data_list: ...Maybe you should reel it in just a little?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Y-yeah, I was honestly thinking the same...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
But my passion is real! I'm going to rebuild myself
and deliver a result worth celebrating.
